name: Bonaire
ocean_info: Bonaire is a world-renowned shore-diving destination in the southern Caribbean. The leeward west coast offers calm, protected water with fringing reefs accessible from shore. The east coast faces trade winds and open Atlantic swell — dramatic scenery, not casual swimming.

coast_guide.west: Calm lee side — shore diving, snorkeling, kayaking
coast_guide.east: Wild windward side — scenery and wind sports

marine_overview.ocean_character: World-renowned shore-diving destination — fringing reefs along the calm leeward west coast; east coast is wild Atlantic scenery.
